Map init behind the fakeable adsb.map.maplibre seam (create!/destroy! protocol); no-token demo-tiles basemap for DEV (prod tiles = adsb-kh4.5) with attribution; privacy-safe fixed regional center [lon -82.0, lat 28.0] zoom 7, never the receiver. CLJS test (test/cljs/adsb/map/view_test.cljs) asserts center/zoom + token-free style and that the shell mounts + inits the map through the seam.
